arts.ttl: Peña reveals ‘unstoppable’ advice Flick has given Barça ahead of Dortmund tie
arts.sum: Now he gets to play one of the biggest games of his career in front of the famous Yellow Wall, and he wants to play his part in helping Barça return to the form that saw them destroy Bayern Munich and Real Madrid earlier this season. Barcelona head into Wednesday’s monster Champions League clash against Borussia Dortmund needing another strong performance from Iñaki Peña, who had a brilliant afternoon and was the sole reason why Barça didn’t lose to Real Betis at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Tottenham have tabled an ‘important offer’ for Barcelona transfer target
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona risk missing out on a leading transfer target to Premier League outfit Tottenham Hotspur. That’s according to Diario Sport, who name Jonathan David as the player…

arts.ttl: Barca should be very happy to have De Jong - Sahin
arts.sum: Barcelona and Dortmund head into the game level on points in the standings, with Sahin insisting there is no favorite for the match. Borussia Dortmund boss Nuri Sahin has been full of praise for Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong ahead of the clash between the two sides in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso speaks out on future of Barcelona free agent target
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen head coach Xabi Alonso has this week spoken out on the future of key defender Jonathan Tah. This, of course, comes amid ongoing speculation linking the German international…

arts.ttl: Barcelona rush to clear cap space for Dani Olmo
arts.sum: Barcelona are working against the clock to make space within their spending cap to prolong Dani Olmo's registration with LaLiga before it expires on Dec. 31, multiple sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Borussia Dortmund - Champions League
arts.sum: How Barcelona could line up for their Champions League clash against Borussia Dortmund on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: MLS, Europe or a Borussia Dortmund fightback: What will Gio Reyna do as another transfer window approaches?
arts.sum: No, at the moment, American soccer is hyper focused on MLS, the league Reyna bypassed to head to Dortmund to really kickstart his career. Despite his best efforts, Reyna remains in that perpetual state of limbo at Borussia Dortmund, and he hasn't been able to escape it for a few years now.

arts.ttl: Flick’s Barca is still a team in construction
arts.sum: The fractured form in recent weeks can largely be attributed to evident dipped physical levels, which unsurprisingly has hindered Barcelona’s execution of the physically demanding system under Hansi Flick. Ever since Barcelona’s win over local rivals Espanyol at the start of November, the team has only managed to accumulate five points from their next five games in the league, with losses against Real Sociedad and Las Palmas and draws against Celta Vigo and Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund’s Niklas Süle to miss several months with an ankle injury
arts.sum: At his pre-match press conference ahead of their Champions League clash against Barcelona, Borussia Dortmund head coach Nuri Sahin revealed that centre-back Niklas Süle will miss the next few months…

arts.ttl: Dortmund confirm major injury blow on eve of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund head coach Nuri Şahin has confirmed a heavy injury blow in his squad, on the eve of the club’s showdown with Barcelona. This comes amid confirmation that defender…
